description.tr: B2B moves aligned to commercial invoice, origin and HS codes—road LTL linehaul is detailed on the cargo page, not here.

keyword.tr: B2B commercial invoice origin HS, Incoterms palletised UK Turkey, trade compliance freight
keyword.en: B2B commercial invoice origin HS, Incoterms palletised UK Turkey, trade compliance freight

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Incoterms drive cost and risk allocation. Standing allocations can reduce lane cost for recurring volumes.
text.en:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Incoterms drive cost and risk allocation. Standing allocations can reduce lane cost for recurring volumes.
